title: FLASHBACK — Papa contemplates her note before flying home
prompt: Medium close-up at the marble cafe table, warm wood interior, brass pendants overhead, empty cafe in soft afternoon light. @young_Papa sitting alone at the table, brown backpack on the floor at feet, right hand HOLDS the small folded coffee receipt at chest height. Looks down at the receipt with a soft smile. The receipt has a phone number written in soft pencil, very visible. Mouth SOFTENS into a private smile. Absolutely NO dialogue, NO voices, NO speech in any language. Only soft music and ambient sound effects (footsteps, leaves, distant traffic). NO foreign-language babble.
